response_text:
This is the problem. Look at the session summaries:

**All they capture is the CRON prompts themselves** — not the actual conversation!

The session hooks captured the cron job instructions asking "extract session summary" — but not the actual user messages from you.

This means:
- The cron ran 30 times today (every 30 min)
- Each time, it captured ITSELF asking to extract a summary
- But the **real conversation** (you and me working on maxclaw) was never captured

Let me check if there's ANY session that has actual user content:
